_meta.description: Ollama function-calling tool definitions for the Sentor knowledge API.
_meta.usage: Include the 'tools' array in your /api/chat request body. Start the API first with: sentor serve
_meta.recommended_workflow: 1. Call search_knowledge to find relevant pages. 2. Call get_page on the top result to read full content.

function.name: search_knowledge
function.description: Search the local Sentor knowledge base. Returns ranked pages whose title, headings, description, or body text match the query. Use this first to discover what is available, then call get_page for the full content of a specific page.

query.description: Search terms, e.g. 'semantic HTML' or 'service workers offline'.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return. Range: 1–50. Default: 5.

category.description: Optional. Filter results to a single category folder, e.g. 'html' or 'ai-tools'. Omit to search all categories.

function.name: get_page
function.description: Retrieve the full plain-text content of a knowledge page by its ID. The text is HTML-stripped and ready for inclusion in a context window. Obtain the page ID from search_knowledge results.

id.description: Page ID in the format category/slug, e.g. 'html/html-quality'. Returned as the 'id' field in search_knowledge results.
